title: fagelia nitida
intro: Fagelia nitida, also known as the "Fagelia shrub," is a tropical plant native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Fagelia nitida include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Fagelia nitida is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are used in herbal supplements to promote overall health and well-being.
